hero.art_prompt: Neha, an 18 year old Indian student, focused and confident, studying a clean data chart on a laptop at home, analytical and aspirational mood.

panels.narration: Neha loved finding patterns and solving puzzles.
panels.img_prompt: Neha, 18, happily exploring a simple data chart on a laptop at home, curious and analytical, tidy room.

panels.narration: But a data career needed real, early training.
panels.img_prompt: Neha looking thoughtful, wondering how to build a data science career, a laptop with a simple chart open, modest room.

panels.narration: Then she found a BCA in Data Science, online.
panels.img_prompt: Neha's face lighting up with excitement at a laptop showing a BCA in Data Science, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: She enrolled and began mastering the craft.
panels.img_prompt: Neha confidently starting her first data science lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why A BCA In Data Science
points: Master the real craft early: Python, data visualisation, statistics and AI basics.
Apply real, hands-on projects and included micro-credentials from semester one.
₹1,47,000 for the full 3-year BCA (₹49,000/year), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ BCA that tech employers recognise.
